'''Bragkis''' was a gambling [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a million-[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] minimum betting parlor once visited by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
